title: Tomtaru's Cobblemon and Farmer's Delight Tweaks
description: An addon for Cobblemon that aims to integrate Cobblemon with Farmer's Delight
body:
Do you like Cobblemon?

Do you like Farmer's Delight?

Do you wish they had some integration with each other?

Look no further than Tomtaru's Cobblemon & Farmer's Delight Tweaks!


Features
- X-items now require the cooking pot!
- EV-boosting items now require the cooking pot!
- Certain healing items now require the cooking pot!
- Food added by Cobblemon can now be cooked in a cooking pot!
